title: ochrosia inventorum
intro: Ochrosia inventorum, also known as the Green Pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the island of New Caledonia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Ochrosia inventorum can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
